services.h2Part1: Three ways to grow your organic
services.card1Desc: A complete diagnosis of your SEO — technical, content, and off-page — with a prioritized roadmap you can execute immediately.
services.card2Desc: Full-service SEO: technical fixes, link building, content optimization, and monthly reporting with revenue attribution.
services.card3Desc: Get your brand cited in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini. LLMs.txt, structured data, and authority content that AI engines trust.

featuredCase.desc: AXS is a nearshoring company serving the US market. Starting from a neglected site with toxic backlinks, we built a revenue-generating SEO program that directly attributed to closing their largest enterprise deal to date.

approach.h2Part1: SEO is a system, not a
approach.phase1Desc: Comprehensive audit: technical health, keyword gaps, competitor landscape, and content opportunities.
approach.phase2Desc: Revenue-first roadmap: prioritized by impact, effort, and business objectives — not vanity metrics.
approach.phase3Desc: Execute with precision: technical fixes, authority link building, and content that converts.
approach.phase4Desc: Monthly reporting tied to revenue. What works gets scaled. What doesn't gets cut.

finalCta.body: Book a free 30-minute audit. I'll review your site, identify the highest-impact opportunities, and give you a clear picture of what's possible.

audit.title: Strategy Audit
audit.desc: A complete diagnostic of your SEO. You'll leave with a clear picture of what's broken, what's working, and exactly what to fix first to generate revenue.
deliverables: Full technical SEO audit (crawl, Core Web Vitals, indexation)
Keyword gap analysis vs. top 3 competitors
60-min strategy call to walk through findings

pricing.h2Part1: Choose the intensity that matches your
pricing.note: The activities are the same across all plans. What changes is the volume and intensity of link building and content production.

offpage: Authority link building (volume varies by plan)

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.q1: What's included in the monthly retainer?
faq.a1: Every plan includes technical SEO monitoring, link building, content optimization, and monthly reporting with revenue attribution. The difference between plans is the volume and intensity of link building and content production.
faq.a2: Start with the Strategy Audit ($500) — it gives you a clear picture of your current situation and which plan makes the most sense for your goals. If you're just getting started with SEO, Base is usually right. If you're already getting traffic and want to scale, Growth or Hyper Growth.
faq.a3: 3 months minimum for monthly retainers. SEO is a compounding activity — the first month is all foundation. Month 2-3 is where you start seeing traction. Clients who stick with it 6+ months see the best results.
faq.a4: Technical fixes can have an impact in 2-4 weeks. Keyword rankings typically improve at 60-90 days. Revenue attribution usually becomes clear at 3-6 months. I'll set realistic expectations in your first audit.
faq.a5: The Strategy Audit is non-refundable once delivered — you're paying for the analysis and my time. Monthly retainers can be cancelled at the end of any month after the 3-month minimum.

finalCta.h2Part1: Not sure which plan is right?
finalCta.body: A $500 strategy audit will tell you exactly where you stand, what's holding you back, and which plan makes sense for your specific situation.

hero.intro: I'm a bilingual B2B SEO consultant based in Latin America, working with companies in the US market. Electrical Engineering background. SEO since 2019. $14.85M+ in client revenue attributed to organic search across 31+ projects.

engineering.h2Part1: SEO is a system that can be
engineering.principle1Desc: Every page, link, and piece of content is a component in a larger system. I optimize the system, not individual tactics.
engineering.principle2Desc: I don't guess. I measure. Every recommendation is backed by data from GSC, GA4, Ahrefs, or Screaming Frog.
engineering.principle3Desc: Build, measure, learn, repeat. The same engineering mindset that improves products applies to SEO.

recognition.title: Speaker at Condor Marketing & Staffing
recognition.desc: Invited speaker on "Mastering SEO for B2B Companies" — covering AI search optimization, revenue attribution, and the shifting landscape of organic search in 2025-2026.
